summary: The CI job completed tests successfully but a Make recipe failed near the end: the `format` and `gen-all` recipes exited with code 127, causing the job to fail.
root_cause: A command invoked by the Makefile recipes `format` and `gen-all` exited with status 127 (command not found or executable not available), causing the Make recipes to fail and the job to exit with code 127.

evidence.quote: error: Recipe `format` failed on line 221 with exit code 127
evidence.reason: Shows the `format` Make recipe failed and reports exit code 127.

evidence.quote: error: Recipe `gen-all` failed on line 32 with exit code 127
evidence.reason: Shows the `gen-all` Make recipe also failed with the same exit code, indicating the failure occurred while running recipe commands.
Confirms the overall CI job ended with exit code 127.

suggested_fix: Identify which command(s) the Makefile recipes `format` (line 221) and `gen-all` (line 32) invoke and ensure those executables are installed/available in the CI environment (add installation steps to the workflow or the runner image). Re-run the workflow after adding the missing tool(s).
